content.full_text:
August 19, 1991

Mr. Mark T. Morodami  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Morodami:

I would like to request a clear position on a birthday card mail program. Our office is looking into the possibility of mailing birthday cards to constituents and have a few questions.

1) Can a mail program such as this be paid for out of our state budget?

2) If this mailing cannot be paid for out of state funds, can the Assemblyman's state office be used as a return address?

3) Because this mailing is not in response to a constituent request but rather initiated from our office, will it be subject to the 199 pieces ruling?

Thank you in advance for your prompt response to this request.

Sincerely,

Kimberly Schuld  
Legislative Aide
